summary: Footage of Trump delivering an address from the lectern in the House chamber, with seated officials and an American flag behind him. A lower-third reads 'TEXT SOTU TO 45470 FOR UPDATES / THE WHITE HOUSE.' The audio is Trump speaking about a White House ceremony for Americans who lost loved ones to crimes involving illegal immigration. The tweet text refers to Angel Families.

script.scene: Trump speaks from the lectern in the House chamber with seated officials behind; chyron 'TEXT SOTU TO 45470 FOR UPDATES.'
